title: Governance Update: Moderation Action Summary
body:
This week we took swift action on reports to protect our community health:

• Banned spam_wave_42 for phishing link spam across multiple channels
• Banned toxic_runner for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers
• Closed report_006 as a false positive — core_maintainer was mistakenly targeted by a brigading campaign; they remain welcome

We handle reports promptly and review every submission. If you see something, say something.

Thank you for helping keep our community safe.
